page.title: Review
page.subtitle: Read through the manuscript and get AI revision suggestions.

emptyWork.body: Select a work on the Works page before reviewing.

emptyChapters.body: This work has no chapters yet. Generate chapters on the Outline page and finish writing before reviewing.

reader.emptyContent: This chapter has no body text yet. Finish it on the Writing page, then come back to review.

assistant.title: Review assistant
assistant.emptyHint: Select a passage and click “Quote to review” to ask AI about plot, worldbuilding, or prose issues.
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask AI for review feedback; @ mentions settings…

clearDialog.title: Clear chat memory
clearDialog.body: This deletes all review-assistant messages for this chapter. It cannot be undone.

toast.chatFailed: AI reply failed; check the LLM connection
